# logic-analyzer-mcp — full agent context

FastMCP 3.2+ MCP server for USB logic analyzers. Sigrok-first with simulator fallback.

## Architecture

- Portmanteau tools (6): la_device, la_configure, la_trigger, la_capture, la_decode, la_help
- Backends: SimulatorBackend (synthetic UART/I2C/SPI patterns), SigrokBackend (sigrok-cli subprocess)
- Session: LogicSession in services/session.py; registry holds last capture/decode
- Transport: stdio (Cursor), http (10985), composite FastAPI server with /mcp mount
- Webapp: Vite React on 10987 — trace lanes + decode table

## Default workflow

1. la_device(operation="list")
2. la_device(operation="connect", device_id="sim-la-001")  # or sigrok:driver:...
3. la_configure(operation="channels", channels=["D0","D1"])
4. la_trigger(operation="set", channel="D0", pattern="rising")
5. la_capture(operation="single", sample_rate_hz=1000000, sample_count=4096)
6. la_decode(operation="uart", rx="D0")
7. la_capture(operation="export_vcd")

## Resources

- resource://la/capabilities
- resource://la/quickstart
- resource://la/last_capture

## Hardware notes

- Hantek 6022BL: flip H/P button for LA mode; 8ch @ 24 MHz via fx2lafw
- DSLogic: dslogic driver
- FX2 Saleae clones: fx2lafw

## Fleet integration

- oscilloscope-mcp: analog rails + digital buses
- kicad-mcp / chip-design-mcp: post-layout verification
- Ports registered in mcp-central-docs/operations/WEBAPP_PORTS.md

## Environment

LOGIC_ANALYZER_MCP_BACKEND=auto|simulator|sigrok
LOGIC_ANALYZER_MCP_SIGROK_CLI=sigrok-cli
LOGIC_ANALYZER_MCP_CAPTURE_DIR=./captures
LOGIC_ANALYZER_MCP_PORT=10985
LOGIC_ANALYZER_MCP_WEBAPP_PORT=10987
